div.h2: Data Race: counter++ Without Mutex — Lost Update
div.p: Three-instruction window (MOV reg←mem · ADD · MOV mem←reg) allows preemption between any two
Final: active_connections = 6 Expected = 7 · Lost 1 increment Both threads loaded 5; both wrote 6
MOV eax, [counter] ; instruction 1 — preemption window OPEN ADD eax, 1 ; instruction 2 — preemption window OPEN MOV [counter], eax ; instruction 3
Any preemption between instructions 1–3 is exploitable
Final: active_connections = 7 ✓ Both increments applied correctly Serialization guarantees visibility
LOCK prefix serializes the RMW across all cores No mutex overhead · same correctness guarantee Used for shutdown_flag in M4

g.text: Add mutex · serialize access · guarantee visibility
